text_block_list.text: One day at the Tokyo Racecourse...

Tokyo Racecourse is as lively as ever! Do
be careful that you don't accidentally
get separated.
Now then, allow me to introduce myself.

choice_data_list: Thank you for bringing me on board.
text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
I'm Tazuna Hayakawa, secretary to the
director, and I'll be your tour guide
today!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Of course. ♪ I'm honored to be able to
meet a new trainer with as bright a
future as yours!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
In any case, we should get on with the
academy tour. But, before that...

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
A race is about to begin. Let's take a
look!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
Can you hear the thunderous cheers
from the crowd?

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
People from all around the world adore
Umamusume racing!

text_block_list.name: Tazuna Hayakawa
text_block_list.text:
And with the fanfare, the curtains are
raised on this stage where you and your
trainee will aim to achieve your dreams!
